title: ahhh dont point it at me it might go off
display_title: ahhh dont point it at me it might go off
wikitext:
[]: 'ahhh don't point it at me it might go off'             Quote Post by Jayfive » Fri Sep 30, 2011 3:42 pm Has anyone noticed this before? Episode 26, alternative universe bit - just when it cant get any funnier I find that while Gendo and Yui have their first conversation Shinji and Asuka are arguing in the background. It goes like this: Asuka; ahhh don't point it at me it might go off Shinji; i can't help it ausuka oh god look at that vien Shinji; the generals at attention Asuka; ahhhh! Shinji;hey its a guy thing Asuka; is it always that small Shinji; just get out of my way would ya

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Sep 30, 2011 3:43 pm That must be the dub...

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Sep 30, 2011 3:56 pm Scripts or it didn't happen. This is pretty out there.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Fri Sep 30, 2011 3:58 pm oh great now i have mental image of Shinji chasing Asuka around the room without pants, gahhhhh

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Fri Sep 30, 2011 4:01 pm The dub had tons of fun with this entire sequence (e.g. "balogna pony"). It's worth watching for the lolz even for dub-haters. Should be easy to find in its entirety on Youtube.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Fri Sep 30, 2011 4:04 pm Sachi wrote: Scripts or it didn't happen. This is pretty out there.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Fri Sep 30, 2011 4:08 pm I'm pretty sure there's a Youtube video that contains only the relevant sequence.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Fri Sep 30, 2011 4:11 pm Probably, but the sound is really clear on that one, hence the comment from someone mentioning that they didnt spot the dialogue until now.

[]:             Quote Post by AngelNo13Bardiel » Fri Sep 30, 2011 4:16 pm Great, yet another thing I'll have to listen for on the next viewing...and therefore, something I'll never unhear (yeah, I know that's not a word) again.

[]:             Quote Post by Tankred » Fri Sep 30, 2011 4:17 pm Bologna pony! Bologna pony! Bologna pony! Bologna pony!

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Sep 30, 2011 4:34 pm I can't make it all out but some of it's definately there now that you point it out. If you listen closely they are arguing about something in the original Japanese track as well though it isn't subbed. Hmm...

[]:             Quote Post by SaVaGe » Fri Sep 30, 2011 4:59 pm Whaaa? They ruined Gendo and Yui's conversation for me.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Fri Sep 30, 2011 6:35 pm *the mental image is forever engraved in my mind* @ Jayfive nice find even if it was just the dub. this is kind of like the radio show in the background when Misato and ritsuko go bar hopping , I think they were talking about somebody's sister being a clone.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Sep 30, 2011 7:00 pm bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: this is kind of like the radio show in the background

[]: Re: 'ahhh don't point it at me it might go off'             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Fri Sep 30, 2011 7:06 pm Jayfive wrote: If the mental image of Shinji with morning wood wasnt bad enough, now it sounds like he's chasing Asuka around the room.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Fri Sep 30, 2011 7:15 pm @Mr. Tines Thanks for Clearing That Up. the exchange is still funny though

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Sep 30, 2011 8:42 pm When you consider the fact that Spike and Tiffany were probably never recording dialogue at the same time, and Matt Greenfield was directing, and that this all probably had to be written out from his own creativity (if it wasn't a direct translation from the Japanese, I forget if there was any bickering in the background in the Japanese dub as well) , then there's the fact that Matt married Tiffany not too long after their NGE project... ...this is just even more hilarious! I always suspected Matt and Tiffany to be playing from the other sides of the glass in the recording studio.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Sep 30, 2011 9:59 pm Mr. Tines wrote: The morning wood scene in the dub is just horseplay.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Oct 01, 2011 2:18 am NemZ wrote: Is it? Like I said, there's definately something being argued about in the original as well.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Oct 01, 2011 3:01 am WHAT HAS BEEN HEARD CANNOT BE UNHEARD. And here I was thinking that "get him again" flamethrower scene was pretty ridiculous.
